/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/nganu-game.dir/link.d "CMakeFiles/nganu-game.dir/src/main.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/nganu-game.dir/src/Game.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/nganu-game.dir/src/World.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/nganu-game.dir/src/NetworkClient.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/nganu-game.dir/home/fanorisky/GameProject/nganu.mp/game-server/vendor/enet/callbacks.c.o" "CMakeFiles/nganu-game.dir/home/fanorisky/GameProject/nganu.mp/game-server/vendor/enet/compress.c.o" "CMakeFiles/nganu-game.dir/home/fanorisky/GameProject/nganu.mp/game-server/vendor/enet/host.c.o" "CMakeFiles/nganu-game.dir/home/fanorisky/GameProject/nganu.mp/game-server/vendor/enet/list.c.o" "CMakeFiles/nganu-game.dir/home/fanorisky/GameProject/nganu.mp/game-server/vendor/enet/packet.c.o" "CMakeFiles/nganu-game.dir/home/fanorisky/GameProject/nganu.mp/game-server/vendor/enet/peer.c.o" "CMakeFiles/nganu-game.dir/home/fanorisky/GameProject/nganu.mp/game-server/vendor/enet/protocol.c.o" "CMakeFiles/nganu-game.dir/home/fanorisky/GameProject/nganu.mp/game-server/vendor/enet/unix.c.o" -o nganu-game  /usr/lib/libraylib.so -lm -L/usr/lib -lraylib
